concerns_addressed: Verified still compliant after subsequent commit 8aaee4d (pi-lens auto-formatter): the only change vs the cycle-2 reviewed SHA is a cosmetic line-break wrapping `templateName(...) · formatRelativeTime(...)` across two lines (HistoryPage.tsx:147-148). No behavioral change.

strengths: Story 6 Rule 1 met: workspace-scoped fetch via api.getAgentBoards(activeWorkspaceId) (HistoryPage.tsx:52) with sort created_at DESC (HistoryPage.tsx:122-124)

Story 6 Rule 2 met exactly: each item renders truncated intent, template display name via TEMPLATE_NAMES/templateName (HistoryPage.tsx:31-37,147), formatRelativeTime date, and executionStatus badge (HistoryPage.tsx:151-153)
Story 6 Rule 3 met: click navigates to /agent?boardId=... (HistoryPage.tsx:137) with no execution trigger — satisfies read-only replay must-not
Story 6 Rule 4 met: empty state with CTA link to /agent (HistoryPage.tsx:101-119)
Robust ancillary states: null-workspace guard, loading, error+retry all handled (HistoryPage.tsx:67-99)
Types/API align: AgentBoard.executionStatus union and getAgentBoards(workspaceId) signature match usage; formatRelativeTime reused from types.ts; no linter errors

issues.description: templateName() falls back to raw templateId for unknown templates; acceptable for Phase 1 (only research-report exists) but would render a slug for future templates
Both a manual 80-char slice and the Tailwind `truncate` class are applied to the intent text — slightly redundant, harmless
No HistoryPage.test.tsx present; plan step 1/3 made the render test explicitly optional ('create if testing-library available, else skip'), so non-blocking, but the TDD must-have is unmet
